sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented in available sources

special_mechanics.name: Jump
special_mechanics.description: Player can jump, documented as a standard FPS feature introduced in Dark Forces

special_mechanics.name: Duck/Crouch
special_mechanics.description: Player can duck, expanding on FPS standards set by Doom

special_mechanics.name: Look Up/Down
special_mechanics.description: Player can look up and down, a notable feature for 1995 FPS games

special_mechanics.name: Vertical Level Design
special_mechanics.description: Jedi engine supports multi-floor level designs with vertical movement challenges

tier_notes: Tier 2 - Qualitative data only. Wikipedia documents gameplay features (jump, duck, look up/down) and level design philosophy but provides no quantitative physics parameters. Jedi engine technical details not publicly documented in accessible sources.
